commitMessage: feat: add agent health utility (autopilot pipeline test)

reproduction.scripts:
build: tsc && tsoa spec
  debug: tsc && node --inspect=9229 dist/server.js
  lint: tsc --noEmit && eslint . --quiet --fix --resolve-plugins-relative-to .
  start: node dist/server.js
  dev: tsc && tsoa spec && nodemon
  test: jest
  test:watch: jest --watch
  test:coverage: jest --coverage
  unitTest: jest --testPathPattern=ut.test\.ts$
  integrationTest: jest --testPathPattern=it.test\.ts$ --detectOpenHandles --forceExit --passWithNoTests
